basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates with a maximum age limit of 30 years who have Master’s degree in Thermal Engineering / Thermal & Fluid Science / Energy Engineering / R&AC / CFD OR Bachelor’s in Mechanical/Energy Engineering with required marks are eligible to apply for these JRF vacancies. The application process for NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 29 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 33 years for OBC-NCL and 35 years for SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates. As per norms and guidelines of the Institute.

qualification.details: Aggregate 60% marks or CGPA of 6.5 (on a 10-point scale) at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category and minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA (on a 10-point scale) for SC/ST/PwD category. Master degree in Thermal Engg., Thermal and Fluid Science, Energy Engineering, R&AC, Computational Fluid Dynamics. OR Bachelor's in Engineering/Technology (Mechanical Engg, Energy Engg), with at least CGPA of 7.5/10 or 70% aggregate of marks under GEN/OBC/EWS category and at least CGPA of 7.0/10 or 65% aggregate for candidates under SC/ST/PWD category. Preference will be given for GATE qualified candidates (but not essential).

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- pm for the first 2 years and Rs. 42,000/- pm for the third year.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on applications Written test and/or interview (offline mode)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Warangal is 29th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- for the third year.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master's degree in specific thermal engineering fields or a Bachelor's in Engineering/Technology (Mechanical/Energy Engineering) with a minimum percentage or CGPA as specified.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided: 33 years for OBC-NCL and 35 years for SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and self-attested documents to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting applications, followed by a written test and/or an interview, which will be conducted in offline mode.

faq.question: Q8. Does the candidate need to have a GATE qualification?
faq.answer: A GATE qualification is preferred but not essential for this Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Warangal located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Warangal is located in Warangal, Telangana, with the pincode 506004.
